root.name: Add Text Box with 'Updated Presentation' to Top-Right of Title Slide
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly adds a text box containing 'Updated Presentation' to the top-right corner of the first slide (title slide) in the PowerPoint presentation.

children.name: Text Box Presence
children.description: Checks if a new text box was added to slide 1.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # Check for added shapes/textboxes on slide 1
    from pptx import Presentation
    prs = Presentation(modified_ppt_path)
    slide = prs.slides[0]
    original_prs = Presentation(original_ppt_path)
    original_slide = original_prs.slides[0]
    
    # Get all text in textboxes for original and modified
    def get_textboxes(slide):
        return [shape for shape in slide.shapes if shape.has_text_frame and shape.text_frame and shape.text.strip()]

    orig_texts = set(shape.text.strip() for shape in get_textboxes(original_slide))
    mod_textboxes = get_textboxes(slide)
    mod_texts = set(shape.text.strip() for shape in mod_textboxes)
    added_texts = mod_texts - orig_texts
    if not added_texts:
        return ("No new text box detected on slide 1.", 0.0)
    # Save for next criterion: which text box was added
    # We'll return 1 if any new textbox was added, else 0
    return ("New text box detected on slide 1.", 1.0)

children.name: Text Content Correctness
children.description: Checks if the newly added text box contains exactly the text 'Updated Presentation'.

children.name: Text Box Position
children.description: Checks if the text box containing 'Updated Presentation' is in the top-right corner of the slide.

children.name: No Extraneous Changes to Slide 1
children.description: Checks that no other content was added, modified, or removed on slide 1 except for the required text box.

metadata.task: Slide 1: Add a text box with the text 'Updated Presentation' in the top-right corner of the title slide
